records.m_Talk_ENG: Tell me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tell me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tell me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where is Jacques hiding?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where is Jacques hiding?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where is Jacques hiding?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh heh... Hiding? Who said anything about hiding? Do you think our Resistance is full of cowards like you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh heh... Hiding? Who said anything about hiding? Do you think our Resistance is full of cowards like you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh heh... Hiding? Who said anything about hiding? Do you think our Resistance is full of cowards like you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch your mouth. A dog of the National Security shouldn't dare speak that name so lightly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch your mouth. A dog of the National Security shouldn't dare speak that name so lightly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch your mouth. A dog of the National Security shouldn't dare speak that name so lightly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Theodor Palmer of the Pure Blood Regiment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Theodor Palmer of the Pure Blood Regiment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Theodor Palmer of the Pure Blood Regiment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were involved in the bombing at the National Foundation Hall as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were involved in the bombing at the National Foundation Hall as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were involved in the bombing at the National Foundation Hall as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The National Foundation Hall?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The National Foundation Hall?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The National Foundation Hall?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Now that I look at you... That face... Don't tell me you're that woman's
8g?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Now that I look at you... That face... Don't tell me you're that woman's
8g?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Now that I look at you... That face... Don't tell me you're that woman's
8g?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quick on the uptake. Then you must know what I'm going to do to you, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quick on the uptake. Then you must know what I'm going to do to you, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quick on the uptake. Then you must know what I'm going to do to you, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How absurd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How absurd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How absurd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does kidnapping me solve?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What does kidnapping me solve?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What does kidnapping me solve?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Louise Schneider had been cooperating with the rebels for the sake of her own safety.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Louise Schneider had been cooperating with the rebels for the sake of her own safety.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Louise Schneider had been cooperating with the rebels for the sake of her own safety.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: The lie you spread to escape the public's condemnation ruined an innocent person's entire life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The lie you spread to escape the public's condemnation ruined an innocent person's entire life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The lie you spread to escape the public's condemnation ruined an innocent person's entire life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It was a necessary sacrifice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It was a necessary sacrifice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It was a necessary sacrifice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The entire Resistance couldn't afford to lose the people's support because of one woman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The entire Resistance couldn't afford to lose the people's support because of one woman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The entire Resistance couldn't afford to lose the people's support because of one woman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're the government's loyal hound, you should understand better than anyone that small sacrifices are sometimes necessary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're the government's loyal hound, you should understand better than anyone that small sacrifices are sometimes necessary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're the government's loyal hound, you should understand better than anyone that small sacrifices are sometimes necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You think of yourselves as patriots.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You think of yourselves as patriots.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You think of yourselves as patriots.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even when hundreds of innocent people are dragged into the consequences of what you've done, you dress it up as some noble cause.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even when hundreds of innocent people are dragged into the consequences of what you've done, you dress it up as some noble cause.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even when hundreds of innocent people are dragged into the consequences of what you've done, you dress it up as some noble cause.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaaagh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaaagh!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaaagh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know that killing me won't accomplish much. You're after information on Jacques, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know that killing me won't accomplish much. You're after information on Jacques, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know that killing me won't accomplish much. You're after information on Jacques, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're aiming for him! Aren't you? He was the one who orchestrated what happened that day!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're aiming for him! Aren't you? He was the one who orchestrated what happened that day!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're aiming for him! Aren't you? He was the one who orchestrated what happened that day!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. Everyone will pay the price.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. Everyone will pay the price.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. Everyone will pay the price.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're just first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're just first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're just first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, we still need a cause to justify ourselves.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, we still need a cause to justify ourselves.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, we still need a cause to justify ourselves.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Otherwise, we can't protect ourselves from the instinctive guilt we're born with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Otherwise, we can't protect ourselves from the instinctive guilt we're born with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Otherwise, we can't protect ourselves from the instinctive guilt we're born with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have mercy... I told you everything. The location of the altar, even where that woman lives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have mercy... I told you everything. The location of the altar, even where that woman lives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have mercy... I told you everything. The location of the altar, even where that woman lives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... exactly do you want from me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... exactly do you want from me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... exactly do you want from me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gelvedas. You were a devout follower of Anapilis, a man who carried out the will of the fairies more faithfully than anyone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gelvedas. You were a devout follower of Anapilis, a man who carried out the will of the fairies more faithfully than anyone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gelvedas. You were a devout follower of Anapilis, a man who carried out the will of the fairies more faithfully than anyone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop your tears and lift your head. Today is not a place to judge you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop your tears and lift your head. Today is not a place to judge you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop your tears and lift your head. Today is not a place to judge you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We simply wish to share with you the faith that we believe in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We simply wish to share with you the faith that we believe in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We simply wish to share with you the faith that we believe in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aah... Elysium Philharmonic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aah... Elysium Philharmonic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aah... Elysium Philharmonic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Madmen like you, who treat human personalities like objects, have no right to speak of faith.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Madmen like you, who treat human personalities like objects, have no right to speak of faith.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Madmen like you, who treat human personalities like objects, have no right to speak of faith.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A ray of light one can grasp in the depths of despair. That is what faith is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A ray of light one can grasp in the depths of despair. That is what faith is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A ray of light one can grasp in the depths of despair. That is what faith is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your goal and ours are not so different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your goal and ours are not so different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your goal and ours are not so different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What you're doing...! Leaves nothing behind but victims!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What you're doing...! Leaves nothing behind but victims!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What you're doing...! Leaves nothing behind but victims!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mental Printing will ultimately save this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mental Printing will ultimately save this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mental Printing will ultimately save this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as the killings you have committed were meant for the sake of the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as the killings you have committed were meant for the sake of the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as the killings you have committed were meant for the sake of the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They were sacrifices chosen by fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They were sacrifices chosen by fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They were sacrifices chosen by fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All we humans can do is follow that choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All we humans can do is follow that choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All we humans can do is follow that choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A small sacrifice to ensure the world's survival. Someone like you, who calls us heretics, will never understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A small sacrifice to ensure the world's survival. Someone like you, who calls us heretics, will never understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A small sacrifice to ensure the world's survival. Someone like you, who calls us heretics, will never understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I do understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I do understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I do understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, the prophecy that the world will meet its end with the birth of the Demon Lord is well known in Elysion as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, the prophecy that the world will meet its end with the birth of the Demon Lord is well known in Elysion as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, the prophecy that the world will meet its end with the birth of the Demon Lord is well known in Elysion as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You simply killed those connected to the birth of the Demon Lord in order to prevent that prophecy from coming true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You simply killed those connected to the birth of the Demon Lord in order to prevent that prophecy from coming true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You simply killed those connected to the birth of the Demon Lord in order to prevent that prophecy from coming true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Under the pretext that they were sacrifices chosen by fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Under the pretext that they were sacrifices chosen by fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Under the pretext that they were sacrifices chosen by fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the same goes for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the same goes for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the same goes for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You, too, are nothing more than a sacrifice chosen by fate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You, too, are nothing more than a sacrifice chosen by fate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You, too, are nothing more than a sacrifice chosen by fate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason you are here today...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason you are here today...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason you are here today...

records.m_Talk_ENG: At our essence, we are no different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At our essence, we are no different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At our essence, we are no different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Leah Schneider.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Leah Schneider.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Leah Schneider.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, you're awake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, you're awake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, you're awake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you hungry? Want a strawberry? These are really delicious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you hungry? Want a strawberry? These are really delicious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you hungry? Want a strawberry? These are really delicious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A kid...? Why is there a kid in a place like this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A kid...? Why is there a kid in a place like this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A kid...? Why is there a kid in a place like this...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kids just exist. No matter where they are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kids just exist. No matter where they are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kids just exist. No matter where they are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know where you are?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know where you are?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know where you are?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where I am is a small matter. As long as I know who I am there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where I am is a small matter. As long as I know who I am there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where I am is a small matter. As long as I know who I am there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's what Mr. Belly said.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's what Mr. Belly said.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's what Mr. Belly said.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who I am?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who I am?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who I am?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Leah Schneider...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Leah Schneider...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Leah Schneider...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nequitia.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nequitia.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nequitia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have two names? I've never heard of anything like that before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have two names? I've never heard of anything like that before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have two names? I've never heard of anything like that before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then since there are two of you, here are two strawberries.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then since there are two of you, here are two strawberries.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then since there are two of you, here are two strawberries.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... thanks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... thanks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... thanks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: These look a little different from the strawberries I know... But they're incredibly sweet. Is it strawberry season?
records.m_Talk_DEU: These look a little different from the strawberries I know... But they're incredibly sweet. Is it strawberry season?
records.m_Talk_FRA: These look a little different from the strawberries I know... But they're incredibly sweet. Is it strawberry season?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it... What season do strawberries grow in...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it... What season do strawberries grow in...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it... What season do strawberries grow in...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid. Do you know what month it is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, kid. Do you know what month it is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, kid. Do you know what month it is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every day is the same day here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every day is the same day here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every day is the same day here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know who brought me here? Is there an adult in this house?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know who brought me here? Is there an adult in this house?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know who brought me here? Is there an adult in this house?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Mr. Belly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Mr. Belly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Mr. Belly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's noon right now, so he's at the place where we pray. We all gather there to pray together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's noon right now, so he's at the place where we pray. We all gather there to pray together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's noon right now, so he's at the place where we pray. We all gather there to pray together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mr. Belly...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mr. Belly...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mr. Belly...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you take me to him?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you take me to him?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you take me to him?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, the sunlight... It's so bright.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, the sunlight... It's so bright.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, the sunlight... It's so bright.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen anything...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen anything...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen anything...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A view like this in my life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A view like this in my life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A view like this in my life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tell me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tell me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tell me.

root.m_Talk_DEU: A ray of light one can grasp in the depths of despair. That is what faith is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A ray of light one can grasp in the depths of despair. That is what faith is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your goal and ours are not so different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your goal and ours are not so different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your goal and ours are not so different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What you're doing...! Leaves nothing behind but victims!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What you're doing...! Leaves nothing behind but victims!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What you're doing...! Leaves nothing behind but victims!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mental Printing will ultimately save this world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mental Printing will ultimately save this world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mental Printing will ultimately save this world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as the killings you have committed were meant for the sake of the world.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as the killings you have committed were meant for the sake of the world.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as the killings you have committed were meant for the sake of the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They were sacrifices chosen by fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They were sacrifices chosen by fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They were sacrifices chosen by fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All we humans can do is follow that choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All we humans can do is follow that choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All we humans can do is follow that choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A small sacrifice to ensure the world's survival. Someone like you, who calls us heretics, will never understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A small sacrifice to ensure the world's survival. Someone like you, who calls us heretics, will never understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A small sacrifice to ensure the world's survival. Someone like you, who calls us heretics, will never understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. I do understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. I do understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. I do understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After all, the prophecy that the world will meet its end with the birth of the Demon Lord is well known in Elysion as well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After all, the prophecy that the world will meet its end with the birth of the Demon Lord is well known in Elysion as well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After all, the prophecy that the world will meet its end with the birth of the Demon Lord is well known in Elysion as well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You simply killed those connected to the birth of the Demon Lord in order to prevent that prophecy from coming true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You simply killed those connected to the birth of the Demon Lord in order to prevent that prophecy from coming true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You simply killed those connected to the birth of the Demon Lord in order to prevent that prophecy from coming true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Under the pretext that they were sacrifices chosen by fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Under the pretext that they were sacrifices chosen by fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Under the pretext that they were sacrifices chosen by fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the same goes for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the same goes for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the same goes for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You, too, are nothing more than a sacrifice chosen by fate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You, too, are nothing more than a sacrifice chosen by fate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You, too, are nothing more than a sacrifice chosen by fate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The reason you are here today...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The reason you are here today...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The reason you are here today...

root.m_Talk_ENG: At our essence, we are no different.
root.m_Talk_DEU: At our essence, we are no different.
root.m_Talk_FRA: At our essence, we are no different.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Leah Schneider.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Leah Schneider.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Leah Schneider.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where am I...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where am I...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where am I...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, you're awake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, you're awake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, you're awake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you hungry? Want a strawberry? These are really delicious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you hungry? Want a strawberry? These are really delicious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you hungry? Want a strawberry? These are really delicious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A kid...? Why is there a kid in a place like this...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A kid...? Why is there a kid in a place like this...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A kid...? Why is there a kid in a place like this...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kids just exist. No matter where they are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kids just exist. No matter where they are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kids just exist. No matter where they are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know where you are?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know where you are?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know where you are?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where I am is a small matter. As long as I know who I am there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where I am is a small matter. As long as I know who I am there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where I am is a small matter. As long as I know who I am there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's what Mr. Belly said.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's what Mr. Belly said.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's what Mr. Belly said.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who I am?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who I am?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who I am?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Leah Schneider...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Leah Schneider...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Leah Schneider...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Nequitia.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Nequitia.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Nequitia.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You have two names? I've never heard of anything like that before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You have two names? I've never heard of anything like that before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You have two names? I've never heard of anything like that before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then since there are two of you, here are two strawberries.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then since there are two of you, here are two strawberries.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then since there are two of you, here are two strawberries.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... thanks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... thanks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... thanks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: These look a little different from the strawberries I know... But they're incredibly sweet. Is it strawberry season?
root.m_Talk_DEU: These look a little different from the strawberries I know... But they're incredibly sweet. Is it strawberry season?
root.m_Talk_FRA: These look a little different from the strawberries I know... But they're incredibly sweet. Is it strawberry season?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Come to think of it... What season do strawberries grow in...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Come to think of it... What season do strawberries grow in...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Come to think of it... What season do strawberries grow in...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey, kid. Do you know what month it is?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey, kid. Do you know what month it is?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey, kid. Do you know what month it is?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no such thing as months. This is the Promised Land.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every day is the same day here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every day is the same day here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every day is the same day here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you know who brought me here? Is there an adult in this house?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you know who brought me here? Is there an adult in this house?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you know who brought me here? Is there an adult in this house?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Mr. Belly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Mr. Belly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Mr. Belly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's noon right now, so he's at the place where we pray. We all gather there to pray together.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's noon right now, so he's at the place where we pray. We all gather there to pray together.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's noon right now, so he's at the place where we pray. We all gather there to pray together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mr. Belly...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mr. Belly...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mr. Belly...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could you take me to him?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could you take me to him?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could you take me to him?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, the sunlight... It's so bright.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, the sunlight... It's so bright.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, the sunlight... It's so bright.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've never seen anything...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've never seen anything...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've never seen anything...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A view like this in my life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A view like this in my life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A view like this in my life.
